model.thesis: Multiple bots can create/route volume across a controlled pool mesh, but controlled bot fees are only profit on the collector ledger. Total-system profit requires an endogenous actuator/spread source, owned LP fee recapture settled to cash, existing claimable fees, or another controlled cash source.
model.totalSystemLedger: controlled bot wallets + fee authority + settlement costs

noGoReasons: controlled bot volume leaks the LP fee share outside the controlled system unless we own the active LP
controlled bot inventory drift/price impact is unpriced; set INVENTORY_RISK_BPS or prove exact neutral route
total-system cash gate below MIN_NET_USD (0.25)
collect authority is not locally signable; direct collect is not executable by this wallet set
